name: Hanging Leg Raise
setup: Hang from pull-up bar with full grip, arms extended
execution: Raise legs until thighs are parallel to floor (or higher)
Keep legs straight or slightly bent
common_mistakes: Using hip flexors more than abs
cues: Crush the bar with your hands (lat engagement)
Point your toes to the ceiling
progression: Knee raise → Bent leg raise → Straight leg → Weighted
